title: Kumarakom Lake Resort is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Kumarakom Lake Resort is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at Kumarakom Lake Resort are looking for an experienced Guest Relations Manager based out of Indore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Kumarakom Lake Resort:
Kumarakom Lake Resort is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kumarakom Lake Resort!
